reviews.comment:
Fua la del ACA de Barracas. La atención en carga de nafta excelente.  Pero la parte de kiosco no tiene uso de la APP de YPF  ni ninguna oferta. Además está desabstecida

(Translated by Google)
It was the ACA in Barracas. The service for fueling was excellent. But the kiosk section doesn't use the YPF app or offer any offers. It's also out of stock.
